title: centaurea × soriana
intro: Centaurea × soriana, also known as Mountain Cornflower, is a hybrid perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × soriana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, while also providing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and skin irritations.
